title: nervilia barklyana
intro: Nervilia barklyana, also known as the Yellow Cobra Lily, is a rare and exotic orchid species found in the tropical regions of New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nervilia barklyana include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
